sglang.title: [PD] Optimistic prefill

Motivation
In PD disaggregation, prefill currently waits for bootstrap to finish before starting prefill computation. That wait contributes directly to TTFT and includes:

the arrival-time skew between prefill and decode schedulers,
decode-side allocation delay under load,
bootstrap server / handsha

sglang.author: brucechanglongxu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When the scheduler is paused via PauseGenerationReqInput (used during weight updates and similar admin operations), the event loop short-circuits at the top of event_loop_normal / event_loop_overlap:
if self._engine_paused:
    self.cancel_bubble_timer()
    continue
The loop never reache
